name: use-html-theme
description: Themed-HTML toolkit, two pure skills. use-html-theme: on any HTML-generation request, offer a catalog of visual themes (Birchline warm-editorial, Technical-minimal docs-site, High-contrast-dark dashboard), apply the chosen theme to all subsequent HTML in the session, and optionally persist it per-project — natural language and [theme: x] inline-flag control, side-by-side preview on request. html-codesign: interactive 'pick and export' decision pages — the reader toggles choices and notes in a self-contained HTML file, then exports the decision as Markdown/JSON with stable IDs for diffable iteration. Portable across Claude Code and Codex.
